_notes: Placeholder, not this microscope's real value. How the camera is turned relative to the stage is measured once by orientation/notebooks/set_orientation.ipynb, which writes the answer to orientation/current.json; the driver reads that when it saves each image. Until the measurement has run, this placeholder means 'no turn', so an un-measured microscope is left as it is. rotate_deg is a clockwise quarter-turn: one of 0, 90, 180, or 270. This is a separate thing from pixel-size calibration and from the stage limits.
